modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Confusion about who manages laundry machines in housing.

full_description_text: La persona que llama no sabe quién es responsable de las máquinas de lavandería. Están en un lugar de vivienda y no están seguros si es Auxiliar Servicios o Facilities Management. Necesitan aclarar quién se encarga de esto.
